song.title: Rubber Band
song.mood: intense and aggressive with a sense of release and catharsis
song.reference_feel: Zac Clayton's unique blend of trap beats and classical strings

sections.prompt: ominous and foreboding, loose twisted rubber band feel with ominous strings and dark percussion
gradually rise in energy, tightening the rubber band with added percussion and synths
intense, aggressive main hook where the rubber band finally snaps with driving strings and heavy synths
release tension with contrast and space, creating a sense of calm with atmospheric pads and ambient textures
sparse calm outro, fading orchestral strings, soft sub bass, distant synth pads and light percussion echoes, A minor, 128 BPM, gentle resolution and release
